mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM productEntities WHERE
categoryID=#{categoryID} and
isHot=#{isHot} and
title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') and
isShow=1 order by sortID, updateTime desc
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO productEntities(categoryID, categoryName, title, subtitle, img, video, zhaiyao, params, content, mbcontent, isHot, sortID, SEOTitle, SEOKeyWord, SEODescription, addTime, updateTime) VALUES(#{categoryID},#{categoryName} , #{title}, #{subtitle}, #{img}, #{video}, #{zhaiyao}, #{params}, #{content}, #{mbcontent}, #{isHot},#{sortID}, #{SEOTitle}, #{SEOKeyWord}, #{SEODescription},#{addTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update:
UPDATE productEntities SET isShow=0 WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(id) from productEntities where isHot = 1 and isShow = 1;
